documents.description: ORDER AFTER HEARING CONSOLIDATION, HEARD ON 11-29-04 FILED BY PETITIONER CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

calendar.matters:
Motion To Consolidate #Cgc-75-698834 Into/Under #Fdi-71-628690
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Granted Subject To Written Order
MINI MINUTES: 11-29-04
(416) Clerk: Louise R. Noriega; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR# 12355.
Admonition given that Commissioner Rebecca Wightman hears matter as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father not present; CSA = MCCALLY.
Motion for Consolidation is granted. Court hereby consolidates #CGC-75-698834 into #FDI-71-628690 with the lead case being #FDI-71-628690. All subsequent filings shall be under the lead case. (WIGHTMAN)
